fixed by patch https://review.whamcloud.com/64649 ("LU-18763 osd: fix credits calculation for overwrites")

commit.subject: LU-18763 osd: fix JBD2 credit exhaustion on sparse files
commit.message:
LU-18763 osd: fix JBD2 credit exhaustion on sparse files

The (est <= allocated) heuristic in osd_declare_write() is flawed as
it includes metadata blocks, leading to underestimated journal credits
for sparse files. Replace it with ldiskfs_map_blocks() to accurately
detect overwrites and avoid JBD2 credit exhaustion.

Test-Parameters: fstype=ldiskfs testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshanx@google.com>
Change-Id: If8d94012bb6035c8259a78816d086596e6f46f3b
